raw_text: yes I agree,that blinkit is Last moment delivery app and very advantageous but I think 💬🤔 that it can make no handling charges as they take delivery charges more as when I order small things it shows 30 rupees and when I make my cart big then it shows that 12 rupees are only cancelled.

Received brocolli only 180 g when ordered 200g and mostly stem not the brocolli itself. When clicking on help button on app - an error occured toast message appears. Any api related to reporting the incident such as chat, help even rate delivery is not working which appears intentional.

The app is good but sometimes it delivers rotten vegetables. I know ordering vegetables from an online app is not good but sometimes it delivers fresh vegetables or fruits at a reasonable price . Also if you order milk from my experience they give you milk which is gonna expire the next day even if the milk has an expiry of 2 days.

worst service platform. they don't have a return and refund policy. Items displayed are different and in poor quality condition. Their support executives are trained with a mentality not to accept their companies fault it's the customer who is always wrong. please don't use this platform or check the item before excepting it, there delivery boys just runaway because the quality of the product is cheap

it was sooo terrible it took extra charge late night fee.i hate it soo much because whenever I order ice cream it always comes melted when the photo says freezed.once I orderd Oreo toffy flavour it comed crushed and 1 Oreo was missing and the packet was open. switch to zepto it is better.blikent is also so confusing and does not sell so much items always some items that I want are out of stock.

Today's delivery is very Bad , I ordered 3 products and when delivered it was not given in bag, it was given in hand one by one. Each product fell down from hand and become useless. Upto now everything was good but today maybe for cost cutting company maybe doing this. Ifso then you have to inform customers so that they can atleast carry their own bags, we can understand that company can't not even afford bags for their valued customers

I would be very happy if they add QR code option for payment. It would be very convenient for me to make payments as my device (tablet) does not support other online options. Many people like students and others who are still financially dependent and may not have their own bank account, have to ask their elders to make payments.This option would serve as an aid to them
Blinkit services has gone down and the quality of products ordered is also poor. Also the unnecessary surcharge is also too much. Also Nowadays Blinkit is always showing currently unavailable.

I placed the order with gift packaging and paid 30 Rupees extra but the order delivered in the regular normal packing. Blinkit didn't ask me before the same and gave me a Coupon on that 30 when I don't want the Coupon I want the refund directly in my account because everyone was wrong at your end.

not quality delivery. sending expired items, leeaking packets. what's the use of this app if it's more trouble than the convenience. we pay for convenience and not for refunds and returns all the time.

On cash on delivery, not giving change every time whether it is 50rs or 10rs. Delivery boy keep change for himself and Go.Very bad service it's a fraud 🤥 while selecting the product it shows available. on delivery it is out of stock n they will not pay back that extra amount also

Ordered Vim Bar, purposely delivered Patanjali dish wash and no option of return or to register a complain for wrong delivery. Also, item changed in the order summary. Very unethical practice. If Blinkit doesnt have a particular item, it should not display it first of all and second shoudl deliver items on its own. hate binkit for this.

i had ordered an watch worth it around 1500 however the product i have received that's different and broken i don't have issue with color i will accept but the item was broken i asked for replacement or refund nothing happened from blinkit i would prefer not to buy anything custoly from this app this is just for groceries not for good stuffs

Really quick service, many options available for the items we need. Once there was a problem in the number of items that we ordered compared to the items delivered - proper resolution was provided & it has never occurred again.

the most expensive app ever i have been seen the product I ordered was 95 ruppee and I ordered 2 items but sell person gives me 1 item only and the service charge will be 60 it is too expensive hate you blinkit after this I'll never order from blinkit and I'll suggest everyone that do not use blinkit 3rd class app

Worst Experience! Money Trapped in Wallet & Zero Support! 😡 Added ₹250 to Blinkit wallet via UPI, but continuously getting "Payment method not available" error. Money is stuck! As a Blinkit Delivery Partner, my manager shockingly said "riders can't use the customer app". If true, why allow money to be added? I've emailed support multiple times with ZERO response. I don't want to order anymore. I want an IMMEDIATE REFUND of my ₹250 back to my UPI. Please resolve this!

blinkit is great when things are needed urgently, otherwise if you want something at a good price and quality you must buy it from local, blinkit has a variety of products but they're costlier from the local market also if you want a normal pen you have order a bunch of them because they don't even have a "single"ball pen.

Support is trashy. With growing costs, delivery agents are becoming scarce, and delivery complaints are increasing with no real support executive. If you order and within first thirty seconds you want to cancel (because they committed 8 mins and agter order increased it to 28 mins due to surge, you are charged for cancellation!)

very bad experience with support chat. you can order the product and you will get it within a very few minutes but when you want to return or replace the product then you cannot return it. And the main thing is that blinkit does not have a customer care number.

I saw a free sample product offer on Blink, and it was showing as available. However, I have not received the product yet. I would like to know the status of this offer and why it was not delivered. Kindly check and update me on this issue as soon as possible.
